title: Triton Jade 3 Electric Shower 9.5kW (Opal 3, Aquasurge, Rosato)
features: Retrofits Triton Aquasurge, Opal 3, Perea and Rosato models
Separate temperature dial and power button controls
2 year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)
description: The Jade 3 is a beautifully styled premium electric shower with Triton's stamp of quality and reliability. This beautiful slimline shower includes separate power and temperature control dials, a rub clean five spray pattern shower head and ‘power on’ and ‘low pressure’ indicators. It is this functionality which makes the Jade 3 great value for money. Plumbing System: Cold mains Minimum Running Pressure/Flow Required: 1 Bar @ 8 l/min Maximum Static Pressure: 10 Bar
